title: Exercise command-center runtime surfaces
description: Operator directive follow-up: exercise the built Command Center, LangGraph runner, RnS/liveness, HPOM pre-dispatch, mission-control, and replay surfaces with real commands, then record what is active, stale, or missing. This task does not edit external CommandCenterUI; it may read it for currency evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Artifact records real command outputs for runner, command-center intake dry-run, mission-control JSON, liveness/RnS dry-run, HPOM/pre-dispatch, and session replay status.
Artifact distinguishes actively working mechanisms from stale or not-yet-integrated mechanisms and names concrete follow-up implementation tasks.
Artifact checks external CommandCenterUI currency read-only and states whether a separate approved edit task is needed.
Task avoids editing external CommandCenterUI or overlapping TASK-174 output paths.
